3318330.name: Tablets of Power
3318330.description:
"Tablets of Power" is a traditional active turn-based RPG that blends classic fantasy with a dash of modern-day humor, creating a rich narrative into its storytelling. Here, your epic adventure collides with the unexpected, leaving you to ponder the very fabric of your world. 

What begins as a seemingly straightforward quest quickly spirals into the revelation of a chilling conspiracy—a shadowy group bent on global domination. You're tasked with stopping these villains and prevent the collapse of civilization and the apocalypse itself. Along the way, you’ll cross paths with interdimensional beings, extraterrestrial entities, and journey around the world, all in pursuit of the Tablets of Power.

TL;DR

JRPG w/ modern humor, turn-based combat, intricate plot twists and a world filled with puzzles, exploration and conspiracy theories.

DOWNLOAD NOW

and let your pixelated odyssey begin. Remember, in this world, legends are not just born; they are pixelated!
